items.title: Open-source macOS video editor
items.oneliner: Swift video editor for macOS adds timeline editing, MCP integration, and AI-assisted workflows you can build on locally.

items.title: GitHub Actions workflow converter
items.oneliner: CLI and library that converts GitHub Actions into tangled workflows, making multi-job CI pipelines easier to inspect and refactor.

items.title: Claude implementation cookbook
items.oneliner: Hands-on recipes for tool calling, multi-agent orchestration, image workflows, and frontend generation using Claude APIs.

items.title: Coding agent failure guide
items.oneliner: Practical guide to AI coding rollout failures, with concrete patterns for preserving reviews, quality gates, and human oversight.

items.title: Local binaural audio workstation
items.oneliner: Local-first audio app analyzes key, BPM, and loudness to tune binaural beats against your music and spoken audio.

items.title: Cheap OpenAI-compatible inference endpoint
items.oneliner: Experimental OpenAI-compatible endpoint serves Qwen3.6-35B with reported 153 ms median latency and 224 tokens per second.

items.title: Bun fork with fast rebuilds
items.oneliner: Early Bun fork in modern Zig targets sub-1s incremental builds for developers who want a hackable JavaScript runtime.

items.title: AI video editing walkthrough
items.oneliner: Step-by-step guide shows non-editors how to speed up video edits using AI tools and ChatGPT-connected workflows.

items.title: Qwen TTS implementation demo
items.oneliner: Practical demo tests multilingual Qwen TTS features, including emotion tags, instruction control, and code for implementation.

items.title: Multimodal video generation model
items.oneliner: Multimodal model page details text, image, and video generation with native audio, plus comparisons practitioners can inspect.
